This [[Wikipedia:category|category]] includes all pages marked as needing reerences by {{tl|unreferenced}}. Because of its size, users may prefer to work with [[:Category:Articles lacking sources by month]], which subdivides reference requests based on when they were requested.
This category exists primarily as an aid to bots and other automated processes.

This [[Wikipedia:category|category]] includes all pages marked as needing references by {{tl|unreferenced}}. Because of its size, users may prefer to work with [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]], which subdivides reference requests based on when they were requested.
This category exists primarily as an aid to bots and other automated processes.
With Telesat’s Teleport Services, customers benefit from sharing the access costs of teleport services, eliminating the need for on-premises earth station equipment, and from the higher level of redundancy and engineering support that a teleport can provide. Teleports also offer customers flexibility. Through its teleports, Telesat can provide satellite-based services in a matter of days instead of months. Customers can build a satellite-based network customized for their business requirements without worrying about long lead times for installations. Telesat’s Teleport Services are custom designed solutions based on point-to-point services from either a Telesat provisioned teleport or from a customer premise. Data speeds ranges from 19.2 Kbps to 55+ Mbps. Telesat’s Teleport Services are dedicated which means no sharing of bandwidth or network resources with other customers. The service is available in both Ku and C-Band in Canada and is purposely designed to meet specific customer requirements.

This [[Wikipedia:category|category]] includes all pages marked as needing references by {{tl|unreferenced}}. Because of its size, users may prefer to work with [[:Category:Articles lacking sources]], which subdivides reference requests based on when they were requested.
This category exists primarily as an aid to bots and other automated processes.
